tasks.subject: Phase 0 — Shared Foundation + Repo Setup
tasks.description: Init repo (uv env, ruff, pytest, pre-commit, .env.example, pyproject.toml), the src/ layout with clinical_core/ and summarizer/ packages, install/run Synthea to generate 25 patient FHIR bundles into data/synthea/ (or use sample bundles escape hatch), build clinical_core/llm/ (LiteLLM wrapper with structured output + token/cost logging), clinical_core/fhir/ (models.py, extract.py, loader.py), and stub clinical_core/eval/faithfulness.py. Acceptance: uv run pytest green; can load a bundle and print normalized models. Build fixtures/alpha|beta|gamma.json.

tasks.subject: Phase 1 — FHIR Ingestion & Normalization
tasks.description: Parse Synthea bundle -> PatientRecord aggregate (demographics + grouped clinical resources). Implement filtered views per CONTRACTS §4 with exact rules (active_conditions, current_medications, recent_encounters N=5, abnormal_results N=10). Handle missing/partial data gracefully. Acceptance: snapshot test on 3 fixture patients produces stable normalized output. conftest.py loads fixtures/ as PatientRecord fixtures.

tasks.subject: Phase 2 — Summarization Pipeline
tasks.description: Design prompt with explicit sections + only-use-provided-facts instruction. Render PatientRecord -> compact structured context (token budget aware). Call LLM with structured output; produce Summary with fixed section order (Problems, Medications, Recent Encounters, Key Results, Allergies) and missing-data placeholders (no_data flag, renderer owns _No data recorded._). summarize(record) -> Summary. Acceptance: readable, correctly sectioned summaries for 5 sample patients via CLI.

tasks.subject: Phase 3 — Evaluation & Guardrails
tasks.description: Implement clinical_core/eval/faithfulness.py: rules layer (dangling resource_id -> auto unsupported) then LLM-as-judge (claude-opus-4-8, sees only bullet text + referenced normalized resource JSON, returns supported|partial|unsupported via structured output). FaithfulnessReport model, THRESHOLD=0.95 strict (partial != supported). Regenerate-on-failure once in pipeline.summarize(). 10-patient eval set with markdown pass/fail report. Acceptance: ≥95% of sampled claims trace to source.

tasks.subject: Phase 4 — Demo UI + Polish
tasks.description: Streamlit app: pick/upload bundle -> show summary + faithfulness score. README with problem statement, architecture diagram, demo GIF, clinical rationale, and privacy note (no real PHI). Acceptance: fresh clone runs in <5 min via documented steps; end-to-end <15s per patient.
